p.strong: System: Vector Storage Engine (Memory Safety Module)
p.em: Implementation Spec: Ensuring stale references are invalidated during slot reuse via generational tracking.

ol.li: Allocation: When a vector is stored, it is assigned a Generation.
Deletion: The memory slot is marked free, but the Generation remains or is zeroed.
Re-Allocation: When the slot is reused, the Generation is incremented (Gen++).
Access: Every pointer dereference compares the Handle.Generation with the Slot.Generation.
ABA Prevention: Even if the Index (A) is recycled (B) and returns to the same state (A), the Generation counter ensures they are logically distinct.
